answer.text:
Dear Saori

With the current DDS logic, once a booking is cancelled, it will be removed from the batch calculation list.
So for these bookings, the solution is to temporarily restore the booking after MT is generated, manually refresh the DDS calculation, and then cancel it again once the calculation is completed.

As shown in the screenshot , both highlighted lines meet the conditions, and No. 2 has a higher priority than No. 8, so the system picked No. 2 first.

If you want No. 8 to take priority, you can do any of the following:

2.	
	Add one more condition to No. 8, for example Cargo Type
3.
